titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 2411
GA 2411
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Word break changed at 11.28 by David Parker.
Iota adscripts removed by David Parker.
Supplied letter added in 18.31 by David Parker.
Word break in 16.9 corrected by David Parker.
Ghost page removed by Catherine Smith.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 2411Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 001rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: EPTranscription begun: 13 August 2010Transcription finished: 02 September 2010 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (>) - Yes, on the following folios: 60v. Obeloi (†) - No Other remarks: Many spelling mistakes. One opening – containing 12.21 29 - has been photographed twice but given different image names 32411x00590XX_bruce-F_a58v Jn and 32411x00600XX_bruce-F_a59v Jn. This means that from F 059v onwards the images are numbered one ahead of what theyshould be. FINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: μ is written lightly (in pencil?) in the margin.
The case that this was corrected from πσ το ψ is strengthened by the similar correction at verse 11.
ι could be a p.m. correction but we treat it as first hand.
The case that this was corrected from πσ το ψ is strengthened by the similar correction at verse 9.
There is a small doubt whether this is a correction or a non-intentional mark.
This word is missing an initial.
